subtitle: CRAFTING DIGITAL EXPERIENCES THROUGH THE LENS OF CODE AND DESIGN.
paragraphs: I AM A DEVELOPER WHO THRIVES AT THE INTERSECTION OF DESIGN AND TECHNOLOGY. MY WORK IS CHARACTERIZED BY A BRUTALIST AESTHETIC AND A FOCUS ON HIGH-PERFORMANCE INTERACTIVITY.
BORN OUT OF A PASSION FOR PROBLEM SOLVING, I HAVE SPENT THE LAST 4 YEARS REFINING MY SKILLS IN FULL-STACK DEVELOPMENT, ALWAYS PUSHING THE BOUNDARIES OF WHAT IS POSSIBLE IN THE BROWSER.

experience.description: BUILDING HIGH-END PORTFOLIOS AND EXPERIMENTAL WEB APPLICATIONS FOR CLIENTS GLOBALLY.
DEVELOPED COMPLEX UI COMPONENTS AND INTEGRATED THIRD-PARTY APIS FOR VARIOUS ENTERPRISE CLIENTS.
